Itemized  ·  Procedures  ·  Office visit, established patient, level 3  ·  California

Office visit, established patient, level 3 cost in California.

Cash-pay range for office visit, established patient, level 3 across 35 hospitals in California: $18 to $457. CPT code 99213. Pulled from each hospital's federally-mandated price transparency file.

Cheapest in California
$18
Children's Hospital Los Angeles
Los Angeles, CA
